sampleArticle.title: Powerton Engineering ta Kammala Babban Aikin Sarrafa Atomatik don Babban Masana'antar Samarwa
sampleArticle.excerpt: An yi nasara wajen aiwatar da cikakkiyar tsarin sarrafa masana'antu wanda ya rage farashin aiki da kashi 30% da inganta aiki da kashi 45%.

content.projectOverviewText: Powerton Engineering ta yi nasara wajen kammala cikakkiyar aikin sarrafa masana'antu don ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana'antun Indiya. Wannan aiki yana wakiltar muhimmiyar mataki a cikin ƙaddamar da mu na samar da maganganun sarrafa na zamani waɗanda ke haifar da kyawun aiki.

achievements.safety: Babu al'amura na aminci yayin aiwatarwa
achievements.uptime: 100% lokacin aiki na tsari tun fara aiki

content.technicalText: Aikin ya ƙunshi haɗewar ci gaban tsarin PLC, aiwatar da SCADA, da cikakkun maganganun kayan aiki. Ƙungiyar mu ta yi aiki tare da abokin ciniki don tabbatar da ƙarancin rushewar ayyukan da ke gudana yayin aiwatar da fasahar sarrafa na zamani.
content.technologiesUsed: Fasahohin da aka yi amfani da su

technologies.scada: SCADA na ci gaba tare da sa ido na lokaci-lokaci
technologies.iot: Na'urori masu gano IoT na masana'antu da haɗin gwiwa

content.testimonialText: Powerton Engineering ta bayar da fiye da tsammaninmu. Sabon tsarin sarrafa ya canza ayyukanmu, kuma muna ganin amfani nan take wajen inganci da rage farashi. Hanyarsu na ƙwarewa da ƙwarewar fasaha sun kasance na musamman.
content.futureText: Dangane da nasarar wannan aiwatarwa, abokin ciniki ya rigaya ya haɗa Powerton Engineering don kashi na biyu na tafiyar su ta sarrafa, wanda zai faɗaɗa tsarin zuwa ƙarin layukan samarwa.
content.conclusionText: Wannan aiki yana nuna iyawarmu na magance ƙalubalen sarrafa masana'antu mai sarkar da kuma samar da sakamako mai auna wanda ke tasiri kai tsaye kan ƙasan layin abokan cinikinmu.

cta.title: Shirye ku don Canza Ayyukanku?
cta.description: Koyi yadda Powerton Engineering zata iya taimaka muku cimma sakamako iri ɗaya tare da maganganun sarrafa masana'antu.

hero.subtitle: Abokin huldarku mai aminci wajen ba da maganganun injiniya da ayyuka masu inganci tsawon sama da shekara 15.

story.title: Tafiyarmu da Hangen Nesa
story.description1: An kafa shi tare da hangen nesa na ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire da fifiko, Powerton Engineering ta yi girma ta zama jagoran samar da maganganun lantarki da kayan aiki a duk duniya.
story.description2: Daga babban ofishinmu a Noida, muna bauta abokan ciniki a duk ƙasar tare da cikakkun maganganun injiniya da suka haɗa da sarrafa tsari, kayan aiki, shigar da hasken rana, da ayyukan kulawa.

quality.description: Mun ɗaure kanmu don samar da samfurori da ayyuka mafi girman inganci waɗanda suka zarce ma'aunin masana'antu.

customer.title: Mayar da Hankali ga Abokin Ciniki
customer.description: Abokan cinikinmu suna cikin zuciyar duk abin da muke yi. Muna aiki tare don fahimta da zarce tsammaninsu.

innovation.title: Kirkire-kirkiren Fasaha
innovation.description: Muna ci gaba da saka hannun jari a sabbin fasahohi da maganganun kirkire-kirkire don kasancewa gaba a yanayin masana'antu.

reliability.title: Dogara
reliability.description: Bayyanannun lambobin mu na isarwa a daidai lokaci da sabis mai dogara ya sa mu zama abokin hulda mai aminci.
